sourceSummary.oneLine: Circuit diagram document DDPT006640 revision 00 dated 2024-11-01 for model X3 TANK board assembly sheets.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design history/regulatory attachment evidence for TANK board assembly circuitry, including board sheets and labeled electrical signals.
keyPoints: Document number is DDPT006640 with revision 00 and date 2024-11-01.
Sheets include TANK MAIN, MULTIPLIER, IO BOARD, and SCH.
The document is marked CONFIDENTIAL and associated with DAEAN R&D CENTER.
Circuit labels include HV_TRANS, CATHODE, FILAMENT, ANODE, KV_FB, MA_FB, TEMP_SEN, TEMP_SW, PWR1, PWR2, FIL_A, FIL_B, FIL_COM, GND, HV+, and HV-.
